Name: Average time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Closed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Closed when preceded by Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time for Completed + Closed in variants that include Completed + In Call versus variants that do not include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Closed in traces where Completed + In Call occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Completed + Resolved and Completed + Closed when Completed + In Call appears earlier in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Cycle time of Completed + Closed conditioned on the presence of Completed + In Call in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time it takes Completed + Closed to be done after the execution of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total resolution time of Completed + Closed in cases where Completed + In Call is the penultimate activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + Closed in variants that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time of Completed + Closed grouped by product when Completed + In Call is present in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average waiting time to Completed + Closed following Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait - User to Completed + Closed in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Time until Completed + Closed is performed after the first occurrence of Completed + In Call in multi-occurrence traces
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Closed segmented by country of the resource executing Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Closed'
